predictions.title: World models will have their “ChatGPT moment”
predictions.description: Mainstream breakthrough for world models beyond synthetic demos.

updates.content: Physically Native World Models: A Hamiltonian Perspective on Generative World Modeling (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00412) - Hamiltonian-constrained world models unifying 2D video gen, 3D reconstruction, and JEPA latent dynamics. Also: World Model for Robot Learning: A Comprehensive Survey (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00080) - survey of world models transforming robot learning.
updates.reasoning: New theoretical paradigm for physically-native world models and a comprehensive survey, both advancing toward a ChatGPT-level breakthrough.

updates.content: Visual Generation in the New Era: An Evolution from Atomic Mapping to Agentic World Modeling (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28185v1) - Traces the evolution of visual generation toward agentic world models that combine spatial reasoning, persistent state, and interactive editing.
updates.reasoning: Progress toward a ChatGPT moment for world models, evolving from pure generation to agentic world modeling.

updates.content: HERMES++: A Unified Driving World Model for 3D Scene Understanding and Generation (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28196v1) - integrates 3D scene understanding and future geometry prediction in a single world model framework.
updates.reasoning: Advances in unified world models for autonomous driving with LLM-enhanced reasoning.

updates.content: Outer-Crust Equations of State for Neutron Stars (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26952v1)
updates.reasoning: Daily arXiv update for this prediction category.

updates.content: How Fast Should a Model Commit to Supervision? (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25907v1) discusses training reasoning models.
updates.reasoning: New research relevant to world models.

updates.content: World2Minecraft: Occupancy-Driven Simulated Scenes Construction (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27578v1) - Constructs simulation environments from real-world occupancy data, advancing world model infrastructure.
updates.reasoning: World model simulation infrastructure advances, bringing embodied world models closer to practical deployment.

updates.content: Shadow-Loom: Causal Reasoning over Graphical World Model of Narratives (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02475) - turns narratives into versioned graphical world models with causal reasoning. Also: Embody4D: A Generalist 4D World Model for Embodied AI (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01799) - generalist 4D world model for embodied AI across multi-view 3D representation.
updates.reasoning: New causal world model framework for narratives and a generalist 4D world model for embodied AI, advancing toward a ChatGPT-level breakthrough for world models.

predictions.title: Non-language models will get more love
predictions.description: Momentum around action models and VLAs (Vision-Language-Action).

updates.content: Thinking in Text and Images: Interleaved Vision--Language Reasoning Traces for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00438) - VLA policy with interleaved text-image reasoning combining spatial constraints and causal order for long-horizon manipulation.
updates.reasoning: VLA model advances with multimodal reasoning traces, furthering the non-language action model paradigm.

updates.content: LaST-R1: Reinforcing Action via Adaptive Physical Latent Reasoning for VLA Models (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28192v1) - Applies RL directly to VLA models for robotic manipulation using adaptive physical latent reasoning. Also: FreeOcc: Training-Free Embodied Open-Vocabulary Occupancy Prediction (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28115v1).
updates.reasoning: Direct advances in vision-language-action models with RL-based reasoning and training-free embodied scene understanding.

updates.content: MotuBrain: An Advanced World Action Model for Robot Control (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27792v1) - Vision-Language-Action (VLA) model combining video generation with world action modeling for robotics.
updates.reasoning: Direct progress on VLA/world action models combining vision, language, and action.

updates.content: Outer-Crust Equations of State for Neutron Stars (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26952v1)
updates.reasoning: Daily arXiv update for this prediction category.

updates.content: DV-World: Benchmarking Data Visualization Agents (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25914v1) explores VLA-related benchmarking.
updates.reasoning: Advancements in agentic benchmarking.

updates.content: A Pattern Language for Resilient Visual Agents (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28001v1) - Software architecture patterns for deploying multimodal foundation models (including VLAs) in enterprise ecosystems.
updates.reasoning: Architecture patterns enabling resilient VLA-based visual agents for production deployment.

updates.content: Seeing Realism from Simulation: Efficient Video Transfer for VLA Data Augmentation (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02757) - sim-to-real VLA data augmentation. Also: MolmoAct2: Action Reasoning Models for Real-world Deployment (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02881) - action reasoning VLA for real-world robots. Also: Latent Bridge: Feature Delta Prediction for Efficient Dual-System VLA Inference (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02739). Also: VILAS: Low-cost VLA Platform with Soft Grasping (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02037).
updates.reasoning: VLA momentum accelerating — MolmoAct2 for real-world deployment, sim-to-real transfer for data augmentation, efficient dual-system inference, and low-cost hardware for VLA policy learning.

predictions.title: Learning will become distributed
predictions.description: Agents continuously learning by observing and copying other agents.

updates.content: FedHarmony: Harmonizing Heterogeneous Label Correlations in Federated Multi-Label Learning (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28024) - federated multi-label learning harmonizing distributed label correlations. Also: AdaBFL: Multi-Layer Defensive Adaptive Aggregation for Byzantine-Robust Federated Learning (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27434) - robust distributed learning.
updates.reasoning: Advances in distributed/federated learning across heterogeneous data sources, supporting decentralized agent learning.

updates.content: CastFlow: Learning Role-Specialized Agentic Workflows for Time Series Forecasting (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27840v1) - Distributed multi-agent learning framework where agents specialize into roles and collaborate.
updates.reasoning: Embodies distributed learning through agent role specialization and collaboration.

updates.content: Safe Bilevel Delegation (SBD): A Formal Framework for Runtime Delegation Safety in Multi-Agent Systems (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27358v1) - formal framework for safe subtask delegation between LLM agents.
updates.reasoning: Advances in distributed multi-agent learning with formal delegation safety guarantees.

updates.content: Outer-Crust Equations of State for Neutron Stars (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26952v1)
updates.reasoning: Daily arXiv update for this prediction category.

updates.content: Recursive Multi-Agent Systems (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25917v1) explores distributed agent learning.
updates.reasoning: Direct research on multi-agent learning.

updates.content: GUI Agents with Reinforcement Learning: Toward Digital Inhabitants (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27955v1) - Applies RL to GUI agents so they continuously learn digital environments. Also: AutoSurfer -- Teaching Web Agents through Comprehensive Surfing, Learning, and Modeling (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27253v1) - web agents learning autonomously by surfing and modeling.
updates.reasoning: Distributed learning through agent-environment interaction: GUI agents learning via RL and web agents learning autonomously.

updates.content: When Stress Becomes Signal: Detecting Antifragility-Compatible Regimes in Multi-Agent LLM Systems (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02463) - multi-agent LLM systems studied for stress-tolerance. Also: Planner Matters! An Efficient Multi-agent Collaboration Framework for Long-horizon Planning (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02168).
updates.reasoning: Distributed learning through multi-agent LLM systems: antifragility analysis of multi-agent collaboration and efficient planning frameworks for long-horizon tasks.

predictions.title: AI, control theory, and formal methods will converge
predictions.description: Intersection for verification, stability, and reliability of RL systems.

updates.content: SAVGO: Learning State-Action Value Geometry with Cosine Similarity for Continuous Control (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00787) - geometry-aware RL bridging representation learning and control. Also: Approximations and Learning for Decentralized Stochastic Control (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00160) - connects control theory and RL for decentralized control.
updates.reasoning: Convergence of control theory (stochastic control) and RL (value-based learning) for verifiable continuous control.

updates.content: Computing Equilibrium beyond Unilateral Deviation (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28186v1) extends game-theoretic equilibrium concepts for multi-agent systems. Also: Exploration Hacking: Can LLMs Learn to Resist RL Training? (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28182v1) reveals critical failure modes in RL training.
updates.reasoning: Intersection of game theory, RL, and verification — both advancing formal guarantees for AI systems.

updates.content: Global Optimality for Constrained Exploration via Penalty Regularization (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28144v1) - connects control theory and RL for constrained maximum-entropy exploration.
updates.reasoning: Intersection of control theory (constrained optimization), RL, and formal methods for exploration.

updates.content: Outer-Crust Equations of State for Neutron Stars (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26952v1)
updates.reasoning: Daily arXiv update for this prediction category.

updates.content: How Fast Should a Model Commit to Supervision? (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25907v1) - training stability and supervision.
updates.reasoning: Supervision dynamics in RL training.

updates.content: Uncertainty-Aware Predictive Safety Filters for Probabilistic Neural Network Dynamics (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26836v1) - Combines model predictive control with probabilistic neural networks for safe RL exploration. Also: PALCAS: A Priority-Aware Lane Change Advisory System using Federated RL (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27118v1) - Federated RL with control-theoretic safety for autonomous vehicles.
updates.reasoning: Direct convergence of control theory (predictive safety filters, MPC) and RL (probabilistic NNs, federated RL) for safe autonomous systems.

updates.content: Enhancing RL Generalizability in Robotics through SHAP Analysis of Algorithms and Hyperparameters (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02867) - RL generalization analysis via SHAP for robotics control. Also: A Relative Ignorability Framework for Decision-Relevant Observability in Control Theory and RL (http://arxiv.org/abs/2504.07722v6).
updates.reasoning: Convergence of RL and control theory through interpretability analysis of RL for robotics and formal frameworks bridging control theory observability with RL decision-making.

predictions.title: Prompt and context engineering will be abstracted away
predictions.description: Handled by prompt compilers and optimizers (desired-state programming).

updates.content: Agent Capsules: Quality-Gated Granularity Control for Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00410) - adaptive runtime treating multi-agent pipeline execution as optimization, abstracting granularity decisions from developers.
updates.reasoning: Auto-mates agent orchestration granularity, further abstracting prompt/context engineering behind runtime optimization.

updates.content: In-Context Prompting Obsoletes Agent Orchestration for Procedural Tasks (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27891v1) - Directly argues that in-context prompting replaces the need for explicit agent orchestration frameworks.
updates.reasoning: Strong evidence for prompt engineering being abstracted away — in-context prompting subsumes orchestration entirely.

updates.content: OMEGA: Optimizing Machine Learning by Evaluating Generated Algorithms (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26211v1) - end-to-end framework combining structured meta-prompting with automated code generation.
updates.reasoning: Automated prompt engineering pipeline that abstracts away manual prompt tuning.

updates.content: Optimizing Dynamic Metasurface Antenna Configurations for Direction-of-Arrival and Polarization Estimation Using an Experimentally Calibrated Multiport-Network Model (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26948v1)
updates.reasoning: Daily arXiv update for this prediction category.

updates.content: How Fast Should a Model Commit to Supervision? (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25907v1) - implications for training automation.
updates.reasoning: Research related to training efficiency.

updates.content: Co-Director: Agentic Generative Video Storytelling (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24842v1) - Automated agentic pipeline for video storytelling that abstracts away prompt engineering into high-level creative direction.
updates.reasoning: Agentic pipeline abstraction that hides prompt-level complexity behind higher-level creative intent specification.

updates.content: Exploiting LLM-as-a-Judge Disposition on Free Text Legal QA via Prompt Optimization (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20726v2) - automatic task prompt optimization. Also: ContraPrompt: Contrastive Prompt Optimization via Dyadic Reasoning Trace Analysis (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17937). Also: Prompt Optimization Enables Stable Algorithmic Collusion in LLM Agents (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17774).
updates.reasoning: Prompt optimization continues to mature as an automated discipline, with contrastive optimization, legal-domain automation, and market stability analysis — pushing prompt engineering further behind the scenes.

predictions.title: New distribution mechanisms for simple apps will emerge
predictions.description: Shipping vibes instead of code; on-demand customization.

updates.content: Position: agentic AI orchestration should be Bayes-consistent (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00742) - Bayesian decision-making for agent orchestration. Also: Can Coding Agents Reproduce Findings in Computational Materials Science? (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00803) - autonomous agent deployment in scientific research.
updates.reasoning: New distribution mechanisms via Bayesian agent orchestration and autonomous scientific agent deployment.

updates.content: Synthetic Computers at Scale for Long-Horizon Productivity Simulation (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28181v1) - Simulates realistic long-horizon productivity work in synthetic computer environments for autonomous AI agents.
updates.reasoning: New paradigm for deploying AI agents that work autonomously in user environments, enabling on-demand app distribution.

updates.content: From Unstructured Recall to Schema-Grounded Memory: Reliable AI Memory via Iterative, Schema-Aware Extraction (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27906v1) - reliable persistent AI memory for application contexts.
updates.reasoning: New distribution mechanisms for AI-powered applications via schema-grounded memory.

updates.content: Outer-Crust Equations of State for Neutron Stars (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26952v1)
updates.reasoning: Daily arXiv update for this prediction category.

updates.content: DV-World: Benchmarking Data Visualization Agents (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25914v1) - new agent evaluation mechanisms.
updates.reasoning: Advancements in agentic application deployment.

updates.content: Addressing the Reality Gap: A Three-Tension Framework for Agentic AI Adoption (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27245v1) - Framework for deploying autonomous agentic AI systems in real-world contexts. Also: Scalable Inference Architectures for Compound AI Systems (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25724v1) - Production deployment patterns for compound AI applications.
updates.reasoning: New deployment and distribution architectures enabling on-demand agentic AI in real-world applications.

updates.content: Building Persona-Based Agents On Demand: Tailoring Multi-Agent Workflows to User Needs (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27882) - on-demand persona-based multi-agent deployment. Also: A Compound AI Agent for Conversational Grant Discovery (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02366) - domain-specific agent distribution. Also: LiveFMBench: Unveiling Agentic Workflows in Specification Generation (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01394).
updates.reasoning: New distribution mechanisms for agentic AI: on-demand persona-based agent workflows, conversational grant discovery agents, and agentic specification generation — shipping capabilities instead of code.

predictions.title: Collaboration will move beyond source-code versioning
predictions.description: Git evolving to version agent interactions and records of intent.

updates.content: RunAgent: Interpreting Natural-Language Plans with Constraint-Guided Execution (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00798) - multi-agent plan execution from natural language. Also: SAGA: Workflow-Atomic Scheduling for AI Agent Inference on GPU Clusters (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00528) - workflow-level scheduling as collaborative units. Also: AgentFloor: How Far Up the tool use Ladder Can Small Open-Weight Models Go? (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00334) - agent workflow routing.
updates.reasoning: New collaboration paradigms: natural-language multi-agent execution, workflow-atomic scheduling, and model routing for agent teams.

updates.content: OmniRobotHome: A Multi-Camera Platform for Real-Time Multiadic Human-Robot Interaction (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28197v1) - Multiple humans and robots collaborating in real homes, multiadic interaction beyond code-centric workflows.
updates.reasoning: New collaboration paradigm with multi-human multi-robot interaction in physical spaces, extending beyond source-code versioning.

updates.content: Heterogeneous Scientific Foundation Model Collaboration (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27351v1) - agentic LLM systems collaborating across scientific domains beyond language-only interfaces.
updates.reasoning: Multi-agent collaboration architectures moving beyond traditional version control patterns.

updates.content: Weighted Linearization of Vector Fields via a Formal Moser Trick (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26950v1)
updates.reasoning: Daily arXiv update for this prediction category.

updates.content: Recursive Multi-Agent Systems (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25917v1) - interactions as fundamental units.
updates.reasoning: Agentic collaboration research.

updates.content: AgentEconomist: An End-to-end Agentic System Translating Economic Intuitions into Executable Experiments (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27725v1) - Agents collaborating beyond code to translate economic theory into computational experiments. Also: The Inverse-Wisdom Law: Architectural Tribalism and the Consensus Paradox in Agentic Swarms (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27274v1) - challenges assumptions about multi-agent collaboration.
updates.reasoning: New collaboration paradigms where agents work together on knowledge creation, moving beyond source-code versioning to idea-to-experiment workflows.

updates.content: Breaking the Communication-Accuracy Trade-off: A Sparsified Information Diffusion Framework for Multi-Agent Collaborative Perception (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00946) - communication-efficient multi-agent collaboration. Also: DySRec: Dynamic Context-Aware Multi-Agent Collaboration (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00574).
updates.reasoning: New collaboration paradigms beyond code: sparsified information diffusion for multi-agent perception teams and context-aware psychological collaboration — moving toward interaction-level versioning.

predictions.title: AI-generated slop will raise the bar for quality
predictions.description: Differentiation shifts to taste, judgment, and intent as AI content floods.

updates.content: TimeMark: A Trustworthy Time Watermarking Framework for Exact Generation-Time Recovery from AIGC (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12216) - time-provenance watermarking for LLM text. Also: Who Gets Flagged? The Pluralistic Evaluation Gap in AI Content Watermarking (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13776) - statistical disparities in watermark detection. Also: UniMark: Unified Adaptive Multi-bit Watermarking for Autoregressive Image Generators (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11843).
updates.reasoning: Watermarking maturing rapidly — time-provenance, pluralistic evaluation, and multi-bit image watermarks raise the bar against AI slop.

updates.content: AEGIS: A Holistic Benchmark for Evaluating Forensic Analysis of AI-Generated Academic Images (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28177v1) - Comprehensive benchmark for forensically detecting AI-generated images in academic contexts.
updates.reasoning: Quality differentiation mechanism for detecting AI-generated slop in academic publishing, raising the bar for authenticated content.

updates.content: DeepSignature: Digitally Signed, Content-Encoding Watermarks for Robust Image Authentication (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23016v1) - AI-generated content watermarking and authentication against synthetic slop.
updates.reasoning: Quality authentication mechanisms raised by the need to differentiate AI-generated content.

updates.content: Outer-Crust Equations of State for Neutron Stars (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26952v1)
updates.reasoning: Daily arXiv update for this prediction category.

updates.content: DV-World: Benchmarking Data Visualization Agents (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25914v1) - focus on data viz benchmark quality.
updates.reasoning: New research focusing on agent evaluation quality.

updates.content: DYMAPIA: A Multi-Domain Framework for Detecting AI-based Video Manipulation (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24426v1) - Multi-domain deepfake detection framework. Also: Dual-Guard: Dual-Channel Latent Watermarking for Provenance and Tamper Localization (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19090v1) - watermarking for AI-generated content authentication.
updates.reasoning: Detection and authentication mechanisms evolving to counter AI-generated slop, raising the bar for verified content quality.

updates.content: Automated In-the-Wild Data Collection for Continual AI Generated Image Detection (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02567) - continual learning for AI-gen image detection. Also: MelShield: Robust Mel-Domain Audio Watermarking for AI Generated Speech (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01515). Also: Fine-Tuning Pre-Trained Code Models for AI-Generated Code Detection (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01596).
updates.reasoning: AI slop detection maturing across modalities: continual image detection, audio watermarking for speech provenance, and code generation detection — raising the bar for authenticated content.

predictions.title: Intelligence will move from digital to physical
predictions.description: Intent automation in the physical world; designing/automating physical systems.

updates.content: Embodied Interpretability: Linking Causal Understanding to Generalization in VLA Models (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00321) - causal understanding in robotic VLA policies. Also: Robot Learning from Human Videos: A Survey (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.27621) - comprehensive survey of robot learning from video data. Also: KinDER: A Physical Reasoning Benchmark (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25788).
updates.reasoning: Intelligence moving physical: causal VLA understanding, robot learning from video, and physical reasoning benchmarks.

updates.content: OmniRobotHome: A Multi-Camera Platform for Real-Time Multiadic Human-Robot Interaction (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28197v1) - Real-time multi-human multi-robot collaboration in homes. Also: FlexiTac: Low-Cost Tactile Sensing for Robotic Systems (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28156v1).
updates.reasoning: Intelligence moving from digital to physical with real-time collaborative robotics and accessible tactile sensing hardware.

updates.content: 3D Generation for Embodied AI and Robotic Simulation: A Survey (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26509v1) - comprehensive survey of 3D content generation for physical-world embodied AI.

updates.content: Anomalous Transport and Explicit Symmetry Breaking in Holography (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26949v1)

updates.content: Recursive Multi-Agent Systems (https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25917v1) - relevance to system-level physical automation.

updates.content: Rule-VLN: Bridging Perception and Compliance via Semantic Reasoning and Geometric Rectification (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16993v1) - Embodied AI navigation agents evolving from reachability to social compliance. Also: PhyMix: Physically Consistent 3D Indoor Scene Generation (http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10125v1) - physically grounded 3D generation for robotics and embodied AI.

updates.content: Embody4D: A Generalist 4D World Model for Embodied AI (http://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01799) - 4D world model bridging digital to physical. predictions.title: Certifications for AI agents
